game_name: Rocko's Modern Life: Spunky's Dangerous Day

design_philosophy.core_loop: Escort platforming: guide Spunky through hazard-filled levels while protecting him from environmental threats
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Balancing character movement with NPC protection mechanics; escort responsibility creates vulnerability
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Control Rocko protecting his dog Spunky through perilous cartoon environments
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Escort-based platformer design constrains player agency by tying success to NPC survival rather than solo traversal mastery; uncommon subgenre choice for licensed platformer

progression.unlock_mechanism: Level-based progression through themed environments (yard, indoor areas)

world_building_techniques: Thematic level design (Rocko's house, dangerous yard environments)

danger_signals: Environmental hazards (geyser, bee, mower, pillar obstacles inferred from SFX asset names)
environmental_storytelling: Yard setting with domestic hazards (mower, geyser, pillar)
Interior environments suggested by level names (yard1 as first level)
Sound design emphasizing cartoon physics (splash, thud, steam, creak)

sources_used: tcrf - Rocko's Modern Life: Spunky's Dangerous Day metadata and asset listing
extraction_notes: Source provides minimal gameplay documentation; primarily asset and metadata information. Escort platformer classification and core loop inferred from title descriptor ('escort platformer'). Specific difficulty parameters, boss patterns, and progression mechanics not documented in available source material. This represents T3 qualitative data with significant gaps requiring primary gameplay analysis for completion.
